question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्यातील सर्व जिल्ह्यांची नावे जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णमालाक्रमाने यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: Retrieve `dim_district`.`district_name` for districts in Andhra Pradesh by joining `dim_state` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id` where `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh', then order by `dim_district`.`district_name` alphabetically.

question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्यासाठी जिल्ह्यांची नावे वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी आणि गटबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Filter `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh'. Join `dim_district` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id`. Select `dim_district`.`district_name` and order by `dim_district`.`district_name` ASC. Grouping is implicit via ordering.

question: प्रत्येक राज्याचे नाव आणि त्याशी संबंधित जिल्हा आयडींची एकूण संख्या, सर्वाधिक जिल्हे असलेल्या राज्यांपासून कमी जिल्हे असलेल्या राज्यांच्या क्रमाने सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) DESC
evidence: Join `dim_state` and `dim_district` on `dim_state.state_id` = `dim_district.state_id`. Group by `dim_state.state_id`, `dim_state.state_name`. Select `dim_state.state_name` and COUNT(`dim_district.district_id`) as district_count. Order by district_count DESC.

question: 'भारत' नावाच्या देशासाठी, प्रत्येक राज्याचे नाव त्या राज्यातील जिल्ह्यांच्या एकूण संख्येसह सूचीबद्ध करा, केवळ कमीत कमी एक जिल्हा असलेली राज्ये समाविष्ट करा आणि परिणाम सर्वाधिक ते सर्वात कमी जिल्हा संख्येनुसार क्रमवारीत लावा.
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) DESC;
evidence: Filter `dim_country` where `dim_country`.`country_name` = 'India'. Join `dim_state` on `dim_country`.`country_id` = `dim_state`.`country_id`. Join `dim_district` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id`. Group by `dim_state`.`state_id`, `dim_state`.`state_name`. Count distinct `dim_district`.`district_id` as district_count. Having district_count >= 1. Order by district_count DESC.

question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्यातील सर्व जिल्ह्यांची नावे, जिल्ह्यांच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमाने यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: Retrieve `dim_district`.`district_name` for districts belonging to state where `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh'. Join `dim_district` with `dim_state` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id`. Order results by `dim_district`.`district_name` in ascending alphabetical order.

question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' राज्यातील जिल्ह्यांची नावे जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार गट केलेली आणि जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावलेली यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Filter `dim_state` where `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh'. Join with `dim_district` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id`. Select `dim_district`.`district_name`. Group by `dim_district`.`district_name`. Order by `dim_district`.`district_name`.

question: 'भारत' नावाच्या देशासाठी, राज्याच्या नावानुसार आणि नंतर जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसावर्णीय क्रमाने जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि राज्याचे नाव यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T3.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: Filter by `dim_country.country_name` = 'India'. Select `dim_district.district_name` and `dim_state.state_name`. Join `dim_country` to `dim_state` on `dim_country.country_id` = `dim_state.country_id`. Join `dim_state` to `dim_district` on `dim_state.state_id` = `dim_district.state_id`. Sort by `dim_state.state_name` ascending, then by `dim_district.district_name` ascending.

question: 'चित्तूर' नावाच्या जिल्ह्यांसाठी देशाचे नाव, राज्याचे नाव आणि जिल्ह्याचे नाव यादी करा, या नोंदींसाठी किमान एक देश रेकॉर्ड अस्तित्वात असल्याची खात्री करा, आणि परिणाम राज्याच्या नावानुसार आणि नंतर देशाच्या नावानुसावरी अल्फाबेटिकली क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T3.COUNTRY_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T3 ON T2.COUNTRY_ID = T3.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' GROUP BY T3.COUNTRY_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.COUNTRY_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC, T3.COUNTRY_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_country`.`country_name`, `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name` from `dim_district` inner join `dim_state` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id` inner join `dim_country` on `dim_state`.`country_id` = `dim_country`.`country_id` where `dim_district`.`district_name` = 'Chittoor' order by `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_country`.`country_name`.

question: राज्यांची नावे आणि प्रत्येक राज्यासाठी जिल्हा आयडींची एकूण संख्या यादी करा, जिल्ह्यांच्या संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने क्रमवारी लावा, आणि केवळ शीर्ष 5 परिणाम दाखवा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T2.DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5
evidence: List `dim_state`.`state_name` and count of `dim_district`.`district_id` per state. Join `dim_state` and `dim_district` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id`. Group by `dim_state`.`state_name`. Order by count descending. Limit to 5.

question: 'भारत' देशातील प्रत्येक राज्यासाठी राज्यांची नावे आणि जिल्हा आयडीची एकूण संख्या यादी करा, केवळ शून्यपेक्षा जास्त जिल्हे असलेली राज्ये समाविष्ट करा, आणि सर्वाधिक जिल्ह्यांच्या संख्येनुसार शीर्ष 5 राज्ये प्रदर्शित करा.
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) DESC LIMIT 5
evidence: Filter by `dim_country.country_name` = 'India'. Join `dim_state` on `dim_country.country_id` and `dim_district` on `dim_state.state_id`. Group by `dim_state.state_name` and count distinct `dim_district.district_id`. Include only groups with count > 0. Order by count descending and limit to 5.

question: सर्व नोंदींसाठी जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णानुक्रमाने क्रमवारी लावून जिल्ह्याचे नाव, राज्याचे नाव आणि देशाचे नाव यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T1.DISTRICT_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T3.COUNTRY_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T3 ON T2.COUNTRY_ID = T3.COUNTRY_ID ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: List (`dim_district`.`district_name`), (`dim_state`.`state_name`), (`dim_country`.`country_name`) for all records by joining `dim_district` (via `state_id`) to `dim_state` and `dim_state` (via `country_id`) to `dim_country`. Sort alphabetically by `dim_district`.`district_name` in ascending order.

question: भारतातील आसाम, आंध्र प्रदेश, बिहार, अरुणाचल प्रदेश किंवा अंदमान आणि निकोबार बेटे या राज्यांमधील सर्व जिल्ह्यांचे देशाचे नाव, राज्याचे नाव आणि जिल्ह्याचे नाव यादी करा, देश, राज्य आणि जिल्हा यानुसार गट करा आणि जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार अकारानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T3.COUNTRY_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T3 ON T2.COUNTRY_ID = T3.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T3.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' AND T2.STATE_NAME IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar', 'Arunachal Pradesh', 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands') GROUP BY T3.COUNTRY_NAME, T2.STATE_NAME, T1.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_country`.`country_name`, `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name` from `dim_country` JOIN `dim_state` ON `dim_country`.`country_id` = `dim_state`.`country_id` JOIN `dim_district` ON `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id` where `dim_state`.`state_name` IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar', 'Arunachal Pradesh', 'Andaman And Nicobar Islands') GROUP BY `dim_country`.`country_name`, `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name` ORDER BY `dim_district`.`district_name` ASC.

question: 'भारत' देशातील किमान एक 'चित्तूर' जिल्हा असलेल्या पण कोणताही 'निकोबार्स' जिल्हा नसलेल्या राज्यांची नावे वर्णानुक्रमानून यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) > 0 AND SUM(CASE WHEN T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Nicobars' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) = 0 ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC
evidence: List `dim_state.state_name` for states in `dim_country.country_name` = 'India' where there is at least one `dim_district.district_name` = 'Chittoor' and no `dim_district.district_name` = 'Nicobars' for that state, ordered alphabetically by `dim_state.state_name`.

question: भारतातील ती राज्यांची नावे वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावलेली सूचीबद्ध करा ज्यात 'चित्तूर' आणि 'प्रकाशम' हे दोन्ही जिल्हे आहेत.
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T1.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' THEN T3.DISTRICT_ID END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Prakasam' THEN T3.DISTRICT_ID END) > 0 ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC
evidence: Find `dim_state`.`state_name` where there exists a `dim_district` record with `dim_district`.`district_name` = 'Chittoor' and `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id`, and also exists a `dim_district` record with `dim_district`.`district_name` = 'Prakasam' and `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id`. Order results alphabetically by `dim_state`.`state_name`.

question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' किंवा 'आसाम' या राज्यांसाठी राज्यांची अद्वितीय नावे, राज्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावलेली यादी करा.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' OR T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME ASC
evidence: Select distinct `dim_state`.`state_name` from `dim_state` where `dim_state`.`state_name` in ('Andhra Pradesh', 'Assam') order by `dim_state`.`state_name`.

question: 'भारत' देशातील अद्वितीय राज्यांची नावे यादी करा आणि त्यांना 'आंध्र प्रदेश' राज्यातील अद्वितीय जिल्ह्यांच्या नावांच्या यादीशी एकत्र करा.
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T1.STATE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_COUNTRY AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID WHERE T2.COUNTRY_NAME = 'India' UNION SELECT DISTINCT T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 JOIN DIM_STATE AS T4 ON T3.STATE_ID = T4.STATE_ID WHERE T4.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh';
evidence: Get unique `dim_state.state_name` where `dim_country.country_name` = 'India', and get unique `dim_district.district_name` where `dim_state.state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh', then combine both lists (likely with UNION).

question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्यात स्थित ULB, RLB किंवा गावांची नावांची यादी करा, गावाच्या नावानुसार वर्णमालेनुसार गटबद्ध आणि क्रमवारीत लावलेली.
sql: SELECT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
evidence: Retrieve distinct `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` values for locations in the state 'Andhra Pradesh'. Join `dim_location` to `dim_district` on `dim_location`.`district_id` = `dim_district`.`district_id`, then join `dim_district` to `dim_state` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id`. Filter where `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh'. Group by `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` and order by `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` alphabetically.

question: बिहार राज्यासाठी, गावाच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार गटबद्ध आणि क्रमवारी लावून, यूएलबी/आरएलबी गावांची नावे आणि उप-जिल्ह्यांची नावे यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar' GROUP BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, T3.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` and `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` from `dim_location` inner join `dim_district` on `dim_location`.`district_id` = `dim_district`.`district_id` inner join `dim_state` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id` where `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Bihar' order by `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`.

question: प्रत्येक राज्याचे नाव आणि त्याशी संबंधित स्थान आयडींची संख्या, राज्याच्या नावानुसार गट करून आणि सर्वाधिक ते सर्वात कमी संख्येनुसार क्रमवारीत सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) DESC
evidence: Count the number of distinct `dim_location`.`location_id` for each state, grouping by `dim_state`.`state_name`. Join `dim_state`, `dim_district`, and `dim_location` using foreign keys: `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id`, `dim_district`.`district_id` = `dim_location`.`district_id`. Sort by count descending, output `dim_state`.`state_name` and the count.

question: राज्याचे नाव आणि त्या राज्यासाठी स्थान आयडींची एकूण संख्या यादी करा, केवळ एकापेक्षा जास्त स्थान आयडी असलेल्या राज्यांवर लक्ष केंद्रित करा आणि परिणामांना स्थान आयडींच्या संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID GROUP BY T1.STATE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) > 1 ORDER BY COUNT(T3.LOCATION_ID) DESC
evidence: Join `dim_state` to `dim_district` on `dim_state.state_id` = `dim_district.state_id`, then join to `dim_location` on `dim_district.district_id` = `dim_location.district_id`. Group by `dim_state.state_name` and count distinct `dim_location.location_id`. Filter for COUNT(`dim_location.location_id`) > 1. Order by count descending.

question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' राज्य आणि 'चित्तूर' जिल्ह्यातील शहरी स्थानिक संस्था, ग्रामीण स्थानिक संस्था किंवा गावांची नावे, गावाच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार गट करून सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' GROUP BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC
evidence: List village names (`dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`) for the state 'Andhra Pradesh' (`dim_state`.`state_name`) and district 'Chittoor' (`dim_district`.`district_name`), grouped by village name and ordered alphabetically. The question mentions 'शहरी स्थानिक संस्था, ग्रामीण स्थानिक संस्था किंवा गावांची नावे' which translates to 'urban local institutions, rural local institutions, or village names' – these are all captured in `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`. No sector filter is needed because village names are independent of sector category. Join `dim_location` → `dim_district` → `dim_state` to filter by state and district.

question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' राज्य आणि 'चित्तूर' जिल्ह्यातील ULB RLB गावांची नावे, गावाच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार गटबद्ध आणि क्रमवारीत सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID INNER JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' GROUP BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC

question: सर्व स्थानांसाठी राज्याचे नाव, देश आयडी, जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि ULB/RLB गावाचे नाव यादी करा, गावाच्या नावानुसार आणि नंतर जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार क्रमाने लावा.
sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T3.COUNTRY_ID, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: Select `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_state`.`country_id`, `dim_district`.`district_name`, `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` from `dim_location` inner join `dim_district` on `dim_location`.`district_id` = `dim_district`.`district_id` inner join `dim_state` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id` order by `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name`.

question: राज्याचे नाव, देश आयडी, जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि यूएलबी/आरएलबी गावाचे नाव या चार वैशिष्ट्यांनुसार समूहीकृत करून, गावाच्या नावानुसार आणि नंतर जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसावर अल्फाबेटिकल क्रमाने मांडा.
sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T3.COUNTRY_ID, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T3.STATE_NAME, T3.COUNTRY_ID ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_state.state_name`, `dim_state.country_id`, `dim_district.district_name`, `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` from `dim_location` inner join `dim_district` on `dim_location.district_id` = `dim_district.district_id` inner join `dim_state` on `dim_district.state_id` = `dim_state.state_id` group by `dim_state.state_name`, `dim_state.country_id`, `dim_district.district_name`, `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` order by `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` asc, `dim_district.district_name` asc.

question: आंध्र प्रदेश राज्यासाठी, जिल्हानुसार गटबद्ध करून, सर्वाधिक गावांच्या संख्येनुसार क्रमवारीत केवळ शीर्ष १० परिणाम दाखवत, जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि वेगळ्या ULB/RLB गावांच्या नावांची संख्या यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) DESC LIMIT 10
evidence: Filter by `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Andhra Pradesh'. Group by `dim_district`.`district_name`. Count distinct `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` per district. Order by count descending. Limit to top 10 results.

question: 'बिहार' राज्यासाठी, प्रत्येक जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि वेगळ्या ULB/RLB गावांची एकूण संख्या यादी करा, केवळ शून्यापेक्षा जास्त गावे असलेले जिल्हे समाविष्ट करा, आणि सर्वाधिक संख्या असलेले शीर्ष 10 जिल्हे प्रदर्शित करा.
sql: SELECT T2.DISTRICT_NAME, COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T2.DISTRICT_ID = T3.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Bihar' GROUP BY T2.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) > 0 ORDER BY COUNT(DISTINCT T3.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME) DESC LIMIT 10
evidence: Filter `dim_state`.`state_name` = 'Bihar'. Join `dim_state` to `dim_district` on `dim_state`.`state_id` = `dim_district`.`state_id`. Join `dim_district` to `dim_location` on `dim_district`.`district_id` = `dim_location`.`district_id`. For each district, count distinct `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`. Include only districts where count > 0. Return top 10 districts ordered by count descending, showing `dim_district`.`district_name` and the count.

question: राज्याचे नाव, जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि यूएलबी/आरएलबी गावाचे नाव यादी करा, राज्य, जिल्हा आणि गावाच्या नावानुसार गट करून आणि गावाच्या नावानुसावर अक्षरक्रमाने क्रमवारी लावून.
sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME;
evidence: List state names (`dim_state`.`state_name`), district names (`dim_district`.`district_name`), and ulb/rlb village names (`dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`) grouped by state, district, and village name, sorted alphabetically by village name.

question: असम, आंध्र प्रदेश किंवा बिहार राज्यातील ठिकाणांसाठी राज्याचे नाव, जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि ULB/RLB गावाचे नाव यादी करा, प्रकाशम जिल्ह्यातील ठिकाणे वगळून, राज्य, जिल्हा आणि गावानुसार गट करा आणि गाव व जिल्ह्यानुसार अल्फाबेटिकल क्रमाने लावा.
sql: SELECT T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T3.STATE_NAME IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar') AND T2.DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN ('Prakasam') GROUP BY T3.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC, T2.DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: List `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name`, `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` for locations in states Assam, Andhra Pradesh, or Bihar, excluding Prakasam district. Join `dim_location` to `dim_district` on `dim_location`.`district_id` = `dim_district`.`district_id`, then join `dim_district` to `dim_state` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id`. Filter where `dim_state`.`state_name` IN ('Assam', 'Andhra Pradesh', 'Bihar') and `dim_district`.`district_name` != 'Prakasam'. Group by `dim_state`.`state_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name`, `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`. Order by `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`, `dim_district`.`district_name` alphabetically.

question: 'चित्तूर' जिल्ह्यासाठी, 'प्रकाशम' जिल्ह्यातही असलेले उपजिल्हे वगळून, उपजिल्हे आणि गावाच्या नावानुसार गट करून आणि गावाच्या नावानुसार क्रमवारी लावून, उपजिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि ULB/RLB गावांची नावे यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' AND T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Prakasam') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME
evidence: Query for distinct sub-district and village names in `dim_location` where district is 'Chittoor' (exact case from sample: 'Chittoor'), excluding sub-districts that also exist in district 'Prakasam' (exact case from sample: 'Prakasam'). Group by (`dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`) and order by village name (`dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`).

question: 'चित्तूर' जिल्ह्यातील तालुक्यांची नावे आणि त्यातील शहरी/ग्रामीण स्थानिक संस्था (ULB/RLB) गावांची नावे यादी करा, 'प्रकाशम' जिल्ह्यातही आढळणारे तालुके वगळून, तालुका आणि गावाच्या नावानुसार गट करून आणि तालुक्याच्या नावानुसार अकारानुक्रमाने क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.DISTRICT_ID = T2.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T1.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' AND T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME NOT IN (SELECT T4.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T4 ON T3.DISTRICT_ID = T4.DISTRICT_ID WHERE T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Prakasam') GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Query distinct `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` for district 'Chittoor' (`dim_district`.`district_name`), excluding sub-districts that also exist in district 'Prakasam'. Join `dim_location` to `dim_district` via `dim_location`.`district_id` = `dim_district`.`district_id`. Use a subquery to find sub-district names in 'Prakasam' district. Group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` and order by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` ascending.

question: ग्रामीण आणि शहरी क्षेत्र श्रेणी दोन्ही समाविष्ट असलेले उप-जिल्ह्यांची नावे यादी करा, प्रत्येक उप-जिल्ह्याचे नाव दर्शवून आणि परिणाम उप-जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारीत लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T2.SECTOR_ID = T3.SECTOR_ID WHERE T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' OR T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Urban' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY) = 2 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME
evidence: Retrieve distinct `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` where there exists both `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural' and `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Urban' for that sub-district. Join `dim_location` with a fact table (e.g., `fact_establishment_totals`) on `dim_location`.`location_id` = fact_table.`location_id`, and join `dim_sector_category` on fact_table.`sector_id` = `dim_sector_category`.`sector_id`. Group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and use HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural' THEN 1 END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Urban' THEN 1 END) > 0. Order by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` ASC.

question: उपजिल्ह्यांची नावे, वर्णानुक्रमाने क्रमवारी लावून, ज्यात किमान एक 'ग्रामीण' आणि किमान एक 'शहरी' वर्गीकृत क्षेत्र आहे.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T2.SECTOR_ID = T3.SECTOR_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' THEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY END) > 0 AND COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Urban' THEN T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY END) > 0 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Retrieve `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` sorted alphabetically where there exists at least one record with `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural' and at least one record with `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Urban' for that sub‑district. This can be checked via any fact table that links `dim_location`.`location_id` and `dim_sector_category`.`sector_id`, e.g., `fact_education_health`.

question: 'आंध्र प्रदेश' किंवा 'आसाम' या राज्यांमधील सर्व जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि राज्याची नावे यादी करा, आणि राज्याच्या नावानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.STATE_NAME, T2.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_STATE AS T1 JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T2 ON T1.STATE_ID = T2.STATE_ID WHERE T1.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' OR T1.STATE_NAME = 'Assam' ORDER BY T1.STATE_NAME
evidence: List (`dim_district`.`district_name`, `dim_state`.`state_name`) for states where `dim_state`.`state_name` is 'Andhra Pradesh' or 'Assam'. Join `dim_district` on `dim_district`.`state_id` = `dim_state`.`state_id`. Order by `dim_state`.`state_name`.

question: राज्याची नावे आणि जिल्ह्याची नावे यादी करा, राज्य आणि जिल्ह्यानुसार गट करून, जेथे राज्याचे नाव 'आंध्र प्रदेश' असे किंवा जिल्ह्याचे नाव 'चित्तूर' असे असलेल्या नोंदींसाठी, केवळ किमान एक जिल्हा आयडी असलेले गट समाविष्ट करून, आणि परिणाम राज्याच्या नावानुसार अक्षरक्रमाने क्रमवारी लावून.
sql: SELECT T2.STATE_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_COUNTRY AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_STATE AS T2 ON T1.COUNTRY_ID = T2.COUNTRY_ID LEFT JOIN DIM_DISTRICT AS T3 ON T2.STATE_ID = T3.STATE_ID WHERE T2.STATE_NAME = 'Andhra Pradesh' OR T3.DISTRICT_NAME = 'Chittoor' GROUP BY T2.STATE_NAME, T3.DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(T3.DISTRICT_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T2.STATE_NAME ASC
evidence: List dim_state.state_name and dim_district.district_name, grouped by dim_state.state_name and dim_district.district_name, where dim_state.state_name = 'Andhra Pradesh' OR dim_district.district_name = 'Chittoor'. Include only groups with at least one dim_district.district_id. Sort results by dim_state.state_name alphabetically.

question: २०१३ च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी आणि 'ग्रामीण' म्हणून वर्गीकृत केलेल्या क्षेत्रांसाठी, जनगणना वर्षानुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावलेल्या अंदाजे पशुधन मूल्ये आणि अंदाजे मत्स्य व जलकृषी मूल्ये कोणती आहेत?
sql: SELECT T1.EST_LIVESTOCK, T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T2 ON T1.SECTOR_ID = T2.SECTOR_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' AND T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' ORDER BY T3.CENSUS_YEAR DESC
evidence: Filter `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013 and `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural'. Select `fact_primary_sector`.`est_livestock` and `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture`. Order by `dim_time`.`census_year` DESC.

question: सर्वात अलीकडील उपलब्ध जनगणना वर्षासाठी, 'ग्रामीण' श्रेणीतील क्षेत्रांसाठी एकूण अंदाजे पशुधन आणि एकूण अंदाजे मत्स्यपालन काय आहे, विशेषतः त्या वर्षासाठी जेथे पशुधन आणि मत्स्यपालन यांची एकत्रित बेरीज शून्यपेक्षा जास्त आहे, त्याचवेळी जनगणना वर्ष दर्शवत?
sql: SELECT SUM(T1.EST_LIVESTOCK), SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T2 ON T1.SECTOR_ID = T2.SECTOR_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' AND T3.CENSUS_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CENSUS_YEAR) FROM DIM_TIME) GROUP BY T3.CENSUS_YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.EST_LIVESTOCK + T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) > 0.000 ORDER BY T3.CENSUS_YEAR DESC
evidence: We need to find the total estimated livestock (`fact_primary_sector`.`est_livestock`) and total estimated fishing/aquaculture (`fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture`) for the 'Rural' sector category (`dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural') in the most recent census year (`dim_time`.`census_year`). The sample SQL results show the most recent census year is '2013'. We must sum these values across all locations where the sum of livestock and fishing/aquaculture is greater than zero (i.e., `fact_primary_sector`.`est_livestock` + `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` > 0).

question: प्रत्येक जनगणना वर्षासाठी, जनगणना वर्ष स्वतः आणि 'ग्रामीण' क्षेत्र श्रेणीसाठी कृषी, पशुसंवर्धन आणि मत्स्यपालन यांचे एकूण अंदाज, वर्षानुसार क्रमवारीत सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T2.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.EST_AGRICULTURE), SUM(T1.EST_LIVESTOCK), SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T1.SECTOR_ID = T3.SECTOR_ID WHERE T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' GROUP BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR
evidence: Sum fact_primary_sector.est_agriculture, fact_primary_sector.est_livestock, and fact_primary_sector.est_fishing_aquaculture for dim_sector_category.sector_category = 'Rural', grouped by dim_time.census_year, ordered by dim_time.census_year.

question: २०१३ च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी, ज्या क्षेत्र श्रेणींमध्ये एकूण संस्थांची संख्या ५०,००० पेक्षा जास्त आहे, त्या सूचीबद्ध करा, विशेषतः निवासी किंवा व्यावसायिक स्थिती ०.००० असलेल्या नोंदी फिल्टर करा, आणि परिणामी क्षेत्र श्रेणींना उतरत्या क्रमाने क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T1 JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T2 ON T1.SECTOR_ID = T2.SECTOR_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T1.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL = 0.000 GROUP BY T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY HAVING SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) > 50000 ORDER BY T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY DESC
evidence: Filter records for `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013 and `fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial` = 0. Group by `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` and sum `fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments` for each sector category. Keep only sector categories where the sum > 50000. List `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` in descending alphabetical order.

question: उपलब्ध सर्वात अलीकडील कालावधीसाठी, ज्या क्षेत्र श्रेणींमध्ये एकूण संस्थांची संख्या 50,000 पेक्षा जास्त आहे, त्यांची यादी करा, विशेषतः ज्या नोंदींमध्ये निवासी किंवा व्यावसायिक स्थिती 0.000 आहे, आणि परिणामांना एकूण संस्थांच्या संख्येनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावा.
sql: SELECT T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T1 JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T2 ON T1.SECTOR_ID = T2.SECTOR_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.TIME_ID = (SELECT MAX(TIME_ID) FROM DIM_TIME) AND T1.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL = 0.000 GROUP BY T2.SECTOR_CATEGORY HAVING SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) > 50000 ORDER BY SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) DESC
evidence: Filter `fact_establishment_totals` for records where `fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial = 0` and `dim_time.census_year` is the maximum (latest) year. Join with `dim_sector_category` on `sector_id`. Group by `dim_sector_category.sector_category`. Sum `fact_establishment_totals.total_establishments` per group. Keep groups where sum > 50000. Order by sum descending.

question: प्रत्येक जनगणना वर्षासाठी, जनगणना वर्ष आणि एकूण अंदाजे मत्स्य आणि जलकृषी मूल्य यादी करा, एकूण अंदाजे मत्स्य आणि जलकृषी मूल्याच्या उतरत्या क्रमाने क्रमवारी लावलेले.
sql: SELECT T2.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID GROUP BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) DESC
evidence: Sum `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` for each `dim_time`.`census_year` by joining `fact_primary_sector` and `dim_time` on `time_id`. Group by `dim_time`.`census_year` and order by the sum descending.

question: प्रत्येक वर्षासाठी जनगणना वर्ष आणि एकूण अंदाजे मत्स्यपालन यादी करा, हे सुनिश्चित करून की एकूण किमान 0.000 आहे, आणि एकूण अंदाजे मत्स्यपालनानुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने परिणाम क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T2.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID GROUP BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) >= 0.000 ORDER BY SUM(T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) DESC
evidence: For each census year, list `dim_time`.`census_year` and the total (sum) of `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture`. Filter where the total >= 0.000. Group by `dim_time`.`census_year`. Order by total descending.

question: अंदाजे मत्स्यपालन मूल्य 0.000 असलेल्या सर्वोच्च 5 नोंदींसाठी, जनगणना वर्ष उतरत्या क्रमाने लावून, अंदाजे मत्स्यपालन मूल्य आणि जनगणना वर्षे यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE, T2.CENSUS_YEAR FROM FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T1 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T1.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID WHERE T1.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE = 0.000 ORDER BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR DESC LIMIT 5
evidence: Filter `fact_primary_sector` where `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` = 0. Join with `dim_time` on `fact_primary_sector`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id`. Order by `dim_time`.`census_year` DESC. Limit 5. Select `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` and `dim_time`.`census_year`.

question: ग्रामीण क्षेत्र श्रेणीसाठी, प्रत्येक वर्षाचे जनगणना वर्ष आणि एकूण अंदाजे मत्स्यपालन यादी करा, एकूण अंदाजे मत्स्यपालनाच्या उतरत्या क्रमाने क्रमवारी लावून, फक्त शीर्ष ५ परिणाम दाखवा.
sql: SELECT T1.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T2.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) FROM DIM_TIME AS T1 JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_SECTOR_CATEGORY AS T3 ON T2.SECTOR_ID = T3.SECTOR_ID WHERE T3.SECTOR_CATEGORY = 'Rural' GROUP BY T1.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE) DESC LIMIT 5
evidence: The question asks for the total number of establishments in the rural sector for the year 2013. This involves the `fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments` column. The sector is rural, which corresponds to `dim_sector_category`.`sector_category` = 'Rural'. The year 2013 corresponds to `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013. The `fact_establishment_totals` table links to `dim_sector_category` via `sector_id` and to `dim_time` via `time_id`.

question: यूएलबी, आरएलबी किंवा गावांची नावे वर्णानुक्रमानून यादी करा, जिथे पशुसंवर्धन संस्थांची एकूण बेरीज शून्यापेक्षा जास्त आहे, विशेषतः अशा स्थानांसाठी फिल्टर करा जिथे वैयक्तिक पशुसंवर्धन संस्थांची संख्या शून्यापेक्षा जास्त आहे आणि निवासी-व्यावसायिक संस्थांची संख्या अचूक शून्य आहे.
sql: SELECT T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID WHERE T2.EST_LIVESTOCK > 0.000 AND T3.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL = 0.000 GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_LIVESTOCK) > 0.000 ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC
evidence: List `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` in alphabetical order for locations where the total sum of `fact_primary_sector`.`est_livestock` (aggregated per location) > 0 and the total sum of `fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial` (aggregated per location) = 0.

question: २०१३ च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी, अंदाजे जनावरांची संख्या शून्यापेक्षा जास्त असलेल्या स्थानांसाठी, उप-जिल्हा नावे आणि यूएलबी/आरएलबी गावांची नावे यादी करा, २०१३ मध्ये अंदाजे निवासी-व्यावसायिक संख्याही शून्यापेक्षा जास्त असलेली कोणतीही स्थाने वगळून, त्यांच्या उप-जिल्हा आणि गावांच्या नावांनुसार गट करून आणि उप-जिल्हानुसार अक्षरानुक्रमाने क्रमवारी लावून.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T2.EST_LIVESTOCK > 0.000 AND T1.LOCATION_ID NOT IN ( SELECT T4.LOCATION_ID FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T4 JOIN DIM_TIME AS T5 ON T4.TIME_ID = T5.TIME_ID WHERE T5.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T4.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL > 0.000 ) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Retrieve `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` for locations where `fact_primary_sector`.`est_livestock` > 0 and `fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial` = 0 for `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013. Group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` and order by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` alphabetically.

question: २०१३ च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी, मत्स्य आणि जलकृषी प्रतिष्ठानांची संख्या ० किंवा अधिक असलेली आणि निवासी व्यावसायिक प्रतिष्ठानांची संख्या ० किंवा अधिक असलेली उपजिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि यूएलबी/आरएलबी गावांची नावे यादी करा, केवळ प्रतिष्ठान एकूणमध्ये किमान एक नोंद असलेली स्थाने समाविष्ट करण्याची खात्री करा आणि परिणाम उपजिल्हा नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID AND T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T4 ON T2.TIME_ID = T4.TIME_ID WHERE T3.EST_FISHING_AQUACULTURE >= 0.000 AND T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL >= 0.000 AND T4.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Retrieve `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` for census year 2013 (`dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013) where `fact_primary_sector`.`est_fishing_aquaculture` >= 0 and `fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial` >= 0 and `fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments` > 0. Join `dim_location` with `fact_primary_sector` and `fact_establishment_totals` on `location_id`, and join both fact tables with `dim_time` on `time_id`. Order by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`.

question: यूएलबी आरएलबी गावांची नावे, वर्णमालानुसार क्रमवारी लावून, त्या स्थानांसाठी सूचीबद्ध करा जिथे वनीकरण आणि काठी उद्योगांची संख्या शून्यापेक्षा जास्त असेल किंवा निवासी आणि व्यावसायिक संस्थांची संख्या शून्यापेक्षा जास्त असेल.
sql: SELECT T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T3 ON T2.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID WHERE T3.EST_FORESTRY_LOGGING > 0.000 OR T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL > 0.000 GROUP BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ASC
evidence: List `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` sorted alphabetically for locations where `fact_primary_sector`.`est_forestry_logging` > 0 OR `fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial` > 0. Join `dim_location` to `fact_primary_sector` and `fact_establishment_totals` on `location_id`. No filters on sector or year are specified.

question: २०१३ च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी, ज्या उप-जिल्हांमध्ये वनीकरण आणि काठबंदी स्थापनांची संख्या ० पेक्षा जास्त आहे किंवा निवासी/व्यावसायिक स्थापनांची संख्या ० पेक्षा जास्त आहे, त्या भागांसाठी उप-जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि ULB/RLB गावांची नावे यादी करा, किमान एक स्थापना नोंद अस्तित्वात असल्याची खात्री करा, आणि परिणामांना उप-जिल्ह्यांच्या नावानुसार अल्फाबेटिकल क्रमाने लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID LEFT JOIN FACT_PRIMARY_SECTOR AS T4 ON T2.LOCATION_ID = T4.LOCATION_ID AND T2.TIME_ID = T4.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND (T4.EST_FORESTRY_LOGGING > 0.000 OR T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL > 0.000) GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Filter for `dim_time.census_year` = 2013. Join `dim_location` with `fact_primary_sector` and `fact_establishment_totals` on `location_id` and `time_id`. Select locations where (`fact_primary_sector.est_forestry_logging` > 0 OR `fact_establishment_totals.est_residential_commercial` > 0) AND `fact_establishment_totals.total_establishments` > 0. Output `dim_location.sub_district_name` and `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name`. Order by `dim_location.sub_district_name` alphabetically.

question: उप-जिल्हाचे नाव आणि जनगणना वर्ष, एकत्रित स्थापनांची बेरीज आणि निवासी-व्यावसायिक स्थापनांची बेरीज, उप-जिल्हा आणि जनगणना वर्ष या दोन्हीनुसार गट करून, आणि जनगणना वर्षानुसार कालानुक्रमानुसार क्रमवारीत लावा.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS), SUM(T1.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T1 JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY T3.CENSUS_YEAR ASC
evidence: SELECT `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_time`.`census_year`, SUM(`fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments`) AS total_establishments_sum, SUM(`fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial`) AS residential_commercial_sum FROM `fact_establishment_totals` JOIN `dim_location` ON `fact_establishment_totals`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id` JOIN `dim_time` ON `fact_establishment_totals`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id` GROUP BY `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_time`.`census_year` ORDER BY `dim_time`.`census_year`

question: सर्व नोंदींसाठी, जिथे एकूण स्थापनांची संख्या शून्यापेक्षा जास्त आहे, त्या नोंदींमध्ये उप-जिल्ह्याची नावे, जनगणना वर्षे, एकूण स्थापनांची संख्या आणि निवासी-व्यावसायिक स्थापनांची बेरीज यादी करा, जनगणना वर्ष आणि एकूण स्थापनांच्या उतरत्या क्रमाने क्रमवारी लावून.
sql: SELECT T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS), SUM(T1.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) FROM FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T1 INNER JOIN DIM_LOCATION AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T1.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID GROUP BY T2.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T3.CENSUS_YEAR HAVING SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) > 0.000 ORDER BY T3.CENSUS_YEAR DESC, SUM(T1.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) DESC
evidence: Select `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_time`.`census_year`, `fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments`, `fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial` from `fact_establishment_totals` join `dim_location` on `fact_establishment_totals`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id` join `dim_time` on `fact_establishment_totals`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id` where `fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments` > 0 order by `dim_time`.`census_year` desc, `fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments` desc.

question: प्रत्येक उपजिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि जनगणना वर्ष 2013 साठी अंदाजे निवासी आणि व्यावसायिक स्थापनांची एकूण बेरीज, उपजिल्हा नावानुसार गट करून आणि सर्वाधिक एकूण बेरीज ते किमान बेरीज अशा क्रमाने मांडा.

question: सर्वात अलीकडील उपलब्ध जनगणना वर्षासाठी, प्रत्येक उप-जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि अंदाजे निवासी व्यावसायिक संस्थांची एकूण बेरीज यादी करा, जिथे अंदाजे निवासी व्यावसायिक मूल्य 0.000 असलेल्या नोंदी फिल्टर करा, आणि परिणामांना बेरीजनुसार उतरत्या क्रमाने लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = (SELECT MAX(CENSUS_YEAR) FROM DIM_TIME) AND T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL = 0.000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) DESC

sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) > 0.000 AND SUM(T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL) = 0.000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL >= 0.000 AND T3.CENSUS_YEAR IN ('2013') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT T3.CENSUS_YEAR) = 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: '2013' च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी ते उपजिल्हे यादी करा जिथे निवासी-व्यावसायिक स्थापना संख्या 0.000 किंवा त्यापेक्षा जास्त आहे, हे सुनिश्चित करा की ते उपजिल्हे त्याच वर्षासाठी त्याच निकष पूर्ण करणाऱ्या उपजिल्ह्यांच्या संचातही दिसतात, आणि परिणाम उपजिल्हा नावानुसार चढत्या क्रमाने प्रदर्शित करा.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL >= 0.000 AND T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME IN (SELECT T4.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T4 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T5 ON T4.LOCATION_ID = T5.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T6 ON T5.TIME_ID = T6.TIME_ID WHERE T5.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL >= 0.000 AND T6.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: List `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` where `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013 and `fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial` >= 0, joining `fact_establishment_totals` with `dim_location` on `location_id` and with `dim_time` on `time_id`. question: २०१३ च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी, उपजिल्ह्यांची नावे,
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND (T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL > 0.000 OR T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME = 'Pilpilow') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Retrieve `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` for the year 2013 (`dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013). question: २०१३ च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी, ज्या उप-जिल्ह्यांमध्ये निवासी-व्यावसायिक संस्थांची संख्या शून्यापेक्षा जास्त असेल किंवा ULB/RLB गावाचे नाव 'पिलपिलो' असेल, आणि त्या उप-जिल्ह्यातील एकूण संस्थांची बेरीज शून्यापेक्षा जास्त असेल, अशा उप-जिल्ह्यांची नावे यादी करा आणि निकाल उप-जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार अक्षरक्रमाने लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_ESTABLISHMENT_TOTALS AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND (T2.EST_RESIDENTIAL_COMMERCIAL > 0.000 OR T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME LIKE 'Pilpilow') GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.TOTAL_ESTABLISHMENTS) > 0.000 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Filter records where `dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013. For each `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, include if either `fact_establishment_totals`.`est_residential_commercial` > 0 OR `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` = 'Pilpilow'. Then group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and keep only those where SUM(`fact_establishment_totals`.`total_establishments`) > 0. Order results by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` alphabetically.

question: जनगणना वर्ष 2013 साठी, त्या उप-जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि ULB/RLB गावांची नावे यादी करा जिथे द्वितीयक क्षेत्रातील एकूण अंदाजे उत्पादन 50 पेक्षा जास्त आहे.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) > 50
evidence: For census year 2013 (`dim_time`.`census_year` = 2013), list `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` where the sum of `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_manufacturing`, `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_electricity_gas`, `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_water_supply_waste`, and `fact_secondary_sector`.`est_construction` is greater than 50. Join `fact_secondary_sector` with `dim_location` on `fact_secondary_sector`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id` and with `dim_time` on `fact_secondary_sector`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id`.

question: २०१३ च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी, दुय्यम क्षेत्रातील एकूण अंदाजे उत्पादन ५० पेक्षा जास्त असलेल्या उप-जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि त्यांच्याशी संबंधित शहरी स्थानिक संस्था (ULB), ग्रामीण स्थानिक संस्था (RLB) किंवा गावांची नावे, एकूण अंदाजे उत्पादनाच्या उतरत्या क्रमाने यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) > 50 ORDER BY SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING) DESC
evidence: Query requires: `dim_location.sub_district_name`, `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name`, and total_secondary (sum of `fact_secondary_sector.est_manufacturing`, `fact_secondary_sector.est_electricity_gas`, `fact_secondary_sector.est_water_supply_waste`, `fact_secondary_sector.est_construction`) for `dim_time.census_year` = 2013. Filter where total_secondary > 50. Order by total_secondary DESC.

question: २०१३ च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी, प्रत्येक उप-जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि त्यांच्या उत्पादन आणि बांधकाम संस्थांची एकूण संख्या, उप-जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार समूहीकृत आणि क्रमवारीत लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, SUM(T2.EST_MANUFACTURING + T2.EST_CONSTRUCTION) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_SECONDARY_SECTOR AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC

question: अंदाजे मानवी आरोग्य आणि सामाजिक कार्य उपक्रमांचे मूल्य 0.000 किंवा त्यापेक्षा जास्त असलेल्या सर्व नोंदींसाठी, उपजिल्हा नावानुसार वर्णमालाक्रमाने समूहबद्ध आणि क्रमवारीत लावलेली, उपजिल्हा नावे आणि ULB/RLB गावांची नावे यादी करा.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_EDUCATION_HEALTH AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID WHERE T2.EST_HUMAN_HEALTH_SOCIAL >= 0.000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Select distinct `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` from `fact_education_health` join `dim_location` on `fact_education_health`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id` where `fact_education_health`.`est_human_health_social` >= 0.0, group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name`, order by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` alphabetically.

question: अंदाजे मानवी आरोग्य आणि सामाजिक कार्य क्रियाकलापांची किंमत 0.000 किंवा त्याहून जास्त असलेल्या स्थानांसाठी, प्रत्येक उप-जिल्हा आणि गाव संयोजनाकडे किमान एक शिक्षण आरोग्य नोंद असल्याची खात्री करून, उप-जिल्ह्यांची नावे आणि ULB/RLB गावांची नावे यादी करा आणि परिणाम उप-जिल्ह्याच्या नावानुसार वर्णक्रमानुसार क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_EDUCATION_HEALTH AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID WHERE T2.EST_HUMAN_HEALTH_SOCIAL >= 0.000 GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME HAVING COUNT(T2.FACT_EDUCATION_HEALTH_ID) >= 1 ORDER BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME ASC
evidence: Select `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` and `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` from `dim_location` inner join `fact_education_health` on `dim_location`.`location_id` = `fact_education_health`.`location_id` where `fact_education_health`.`est_human_health_social` >= 0. Group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_location`.`ulb_rlb_village_name` to ensure unique combinations. Order by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name` alphabetically.

question: उपजिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि जनगणना वर्ष, तसेच अंदाजे शिक्षण आणि अंदाजे मानवी आरोग्य आणि सामाजिक मूल्यांची एकूण बेरीज, उपजिल्हा आणि जनगणना वर्षानुसार गट करून, आणि जनगणना वर्षानुसार कालानुक्रमाने क्रमवारीत लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T3.EST_EDUCATION + T3.EST_HUMAN_HEALTH_SOCIAL) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_EDUCATION_HEALTH AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T3.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.CENSUS_YEAR ORDER BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR ASC
evidence: Select `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_time`.`census_year`, SUM(`fact_education_health`.`est_education`) AS total_est_education, SUM(`fact_education_health`.`est_human_health_social`) AS total_est_human_health_social from `fact_education_health` join `dim_location` on `fact_education_health`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id` join `dim_time` on `fact_education_health`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id` group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_time`.`census_year` order by `dim_time`.`census_year`

question: उप-जिल्ह्याचे नाव आणि जनगणना वर्ष, तसेच अंदाजे शिक्षण आणि अंदाजे मानवी आरोग्य व सामाजिक मूल्यांची एकूण बेरीज, प्रत्येक उप-जिल्ह्यासाठी आणि जनगणना वर्षासाठी यादी करा, जिथे ती बेरीज किमान 0.000 आहे, जनगणना वर्ष आणि एकूण बेरीज उतरत्या क्रमाने क्रमवारी लावा.
sql: SELECT T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.CENSUS_YEAR, SUM(T3.EST_EDUCATION + T3.EST_HUMAN_HEALTH_SOCIAL) FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 INNER JOIN FACT_EDUCATION_HEALTH AS T3 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T3.LOCATION_ID INNER JOIN DIM_TIME AS T2 ON T3.TIME_ID = T2.TIME_ID GROUP BY T1.SUB_DISTRICT_NAME, T2.CENSUS_YEAR HAVING SUM(T3.EST_EDUCATION + T3.EST_HUMAN_HEALTH_SOCIAL) >= 0.000 ORDER BY T2.CENSUS_YEAR DESC, SUM(T3.EST_EDUCATION + T3.EST_HUMAN_HEALTH_SOCIAL) DESC
evidence: Select `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_time`.`census_year`, SUM(`fact_education_health`.`est_education` + `fact_education_health`.`est_human_health_social`) AS total_sum from `fact_education_health` join `dim_location` on `fact_education_health`.`location_id` = `dim_location`.`location_id` join `dim_time` on `fact_education_health`.`time_id` = `dim_time`.`time_id` group by `dim_location`.`sub_district_name`, `dim_time`.`census_year` having total_sum >= 0.000 order by `dim_time`.`census_year` DESC, total_sum DESC.

question: २०१३ च्या जनगणना वर्षासाठी, अंदाजे मानवी आरोग्य आणि सामाजिक कार्य मूल्य ५० पेक्षा जास्त असलेल्या ULB RLB गावांची नावे सूचीबद्ध करा.
sql: SELECT T1.ULB_RLB_VILLAGE_NAME FROM DIM_LOCATION AS T1 JOIN FACT_EDUCATION_HEALTH AS T2 ON T1.LOCATION_ID = T2.LOCATION_ID JOIN DIM_TIME AS T3 ON T2.TIME_ID = T3.TIME_ID WHERE T3.CENSUS_YEAR = '2013' AND T2.EST_HUMAN_HEALTH_SOCIAL > 50
evidence: List `dim_location.ulb_rlb_village_name` where `dim_time.census_year` = 2013 and `fact_education_health.est_human_health_social` > 50. Join `fact_education_health` with `dim_location` on `fact_education_health.location_id` = `dim_location.location_id` and with `dim_time` on `fact_education_health.time_id` = `dim_time.time_id`.
